title: Robust Crisp Filipino Pork Bicol Express
description: A winey and crisp Filipino dish featuring sherry vinegar and a mirepoix base, this Bicol Express recipe is an anti-inflammatory friendly twist on a nostalgic classic.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sherry vinegar, coconut milk, fish sauce, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Increase the heat to medium high and cook until the sauce has thickened and the pork is crispy, about 5 minutes.
Serve the Bicol Express hot over rice or with steamed vegetables.
